title: PagerDuty Maintenance Window Suppression Audit Trail
dataSources: PagerDuty audit records for maintenance windows
spl:
index=alerts sourcetype="pagerduty:audit" OR sourcetype="pagerduty:maintenance"
| search "maintenance" AND ("create" OR "delete" OR "update")
| stats values(action) as actions, latest(_time) as t by actor_email, maintenance_id
| sort -t
description: Unauthorized maintenance suppressions hide real outages from paging.
value: Supports SOC2 change evidence for suppression windows.
implementation: Restrict index permissions; include IP and user agent if available.
knownFalsePositives: Audit differences during long programs, data retention work, or new fields in the integration.
grandmaExplanation: We keep a clear trail of what we hid during a maintenance window, so we can show auditors and the team that silence was on purpose.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Install and configure: PagerDuty Audit API (v2) scripted input.
• Data: PagerDuty audit records for maintenance windows.
• For directory layout and inputs, see docs/implementation-guide.md.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Restrict index permissions; include IP and user agent if available.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Run the following search (then save as report or alert; tune time range and threshold):

```spl
index=alerts sourcetype="pagerduty:audit" OR sourcetype="pagerduty:maintenance"
| search "maintenance" AND ("create" OR "delete" OR "update")
| stats values(action) as actions, latest(_time) as t by actor_email, maintenance_id
| sort -t
```

Understanding this search
Unauthorized maintenance suppressions hide real outages from paging.

Step 3 — Validate
Compare with the PagerDuty incident timeline and service view for the same window. Reconcile a few incident numbers, state changes, and acknowledgement times. If anything disagrees, check export lag, time zone, and which API fields we map.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Add to a dashboard, wire alert actions, and document ownership. Suggested view: Table (actor × maintenance_id), Timeline.
